summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Toko Accu Prima Battery website. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, WhatsApp integration, Google Maps, and interactive elements.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu button not properly visible/clickable on mobile breakpoints
ui_bugs.description: Mobile menu button exists in DOM with correct CSS properties but not clickable, likely due to responsive breakpoint or z-index issue

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero, services, brands sections
Navigation between all pages (Beranda, Tentang Kami, Produk, Layanan, Ulasan, Kontak)
WhatsApp floating button visible and functional
Products page tabs (Aki Mobil/Aki Motor) switching correctly
Contact page Google Maps embed working
All CTA buttons link to WhatsApp (+6282158544469) and Phone correctly
Website responsive design on different screen sizes
All WhatsApp links contain correct message templates
All phone links use correct Indonesian phone number format
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile responsive menu button visibility issue in Navbar component - check CSS breakpoints and z-index for mobile menu button
